arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold warned he's walking into a 'mess' at Real Madrid - 'You get killed'
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold has been warned against joining Real Madrid this summer because the environment is so ruthless and world's away from the welcoming dressing room at Liverpool

arts.ttl: Two Real Madrid stars have had their contracts extended until July
arts.sum: Two members of the first-team ranks at La Liga giants Real Madrid have seen their contract terms extended for an extra month. That’s according to Diario AS, who point towards…

arts.ttl: Jurgen Klopp's plan for managerial return revealed after Real Madrid snub
arts.sum: Klopp surprisingly took over as Red Bull's global head of soccer at the start of the year, operating in more of a supervisory role. Former Liverpool manager Jurgen Klopp isn't expected to take over another club or national team until the summer of 2026 at the earliest, according to a new report.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti to make tough decision on this key Real Madrid star
arts.sum: Mbappé, on the other hand, did train with the squad on Tuesday and could feature if needed—but Ancelotti prefers to rest him to ensure he’s fresh for the Copa del Rey final. As a result, Ancelotti is expected to make changes to his starting eleven and, more importantly, to the formation, shifting away from his usual setup with Saturday’s final in Sevilla in mind.

arts.ttl: Chelsea knock Real Madrid out with €60m bid
arts.sum: The new Spain international star has attracted interest from Real Madrid as well as Premier League giants Arsenal, Liverpool, Tottenham Hotspur and Newcastle United, but according to a report from AS, Chelsea have pushed themselves to the front of the queue to sign the 20-year-old. Dean Huijsen transfer latest: Chelsea willing to match release clause

arts.ttl: Getafe vs Real Madrid 2025 live stream: Time, TV channels and how to watch La Liga online
arts.sum: Real Madrid visit Getafe just three days ahead of the Copa del Rey Final against Barcelona. Real Madrid predicted XI: Courtois, Asencio, Tchouameni, Fran Garcia, Camavinga, Ceballos, Valverde, Bellingham, Rodrygo, Vinicius.

arts.ttl: Messi wants Real Madrid star at Inter Miami: Beckham says yes to deal
arts.sum: Barcelona legend Lionel Messi is reportedly keen to link up with one of his former Real Madrid rivals this summer as his latest superstar teammate at Inter Miami. Messi wants Real Madrid star at Inter Miami: Beckham says yes to deal

arts.ttl: Vinicius Jr risks two-year BAN as bombshell FIFA probe puts Real Madrid star's new contract in doubt
arts.sum: The Brazil attacker is on the verge of signing an extension with Los Blancos - but those plans could be put in jeopardy

arts.ttl: Figo: What happened to Ancelotti after defeat vs. Arsenal is ‘absurd’
arts.sum: Former Inter star Luis Figo defends Carlo Ancelotti and feels that doubts over his future...

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick launches impassioned defence of Carlo Ancelotti amid sack speculation
arts.sum: Real Madrid are reportedly ready to sack Carlo Ancelotti and Barcelona manager Hansi Flick has weighed in on the discussion.
